body.purpose: UI copy, tables, forms, descriptions. Plus Jakarta Sans.

label.purpose: Form labels, section headers, uppercase tracking labels.

mono.purpose: Marketing eyebrows, telemetry badges, ticket numbers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action on dark app surfaces. Signal-deep fill, dark ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #12B489; color: #03130d; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #38E8B0; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(56,232,176,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions, cancel buttons, low-emphasis CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: #EAEEF5; padding: 12px 22px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-color: #1E7D63; color: #EAEEF5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(56,232,176,0.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form text field on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8D98AC; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.5); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 12px; color: #EAEEF5; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #38E8B0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(56,232,176,0.3); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Active and inactive navigation items in the app sidebar.
components.html: DashboardIncidents
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; } .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e2e8f0; background: rgba(30,41,59,0.5); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #38E8B0; font-weight: 700; background: rgba(56,232,176,0.10); border-color: rgba(56,232,176,0.20); box-shadow: inset 0 0 12px rgba(56,232,176,0.1); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: SLA Status Chip
components.description: Compact SLA status indicator for queue and list views.
components.css: .ds-sla-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid; } .ds-sla-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-sla-chip--breached { background: rgba(244,63,94,0.1); color: #fb7185; border-color: rgba(244,63,94,0.3); } .ds-sla-chip--on-track { background: rgba(52,211,153,0.1); color: #34d399; border-color: rgba(52,211,153,0.2); } .ds-sla-chip--due-soon { background: rgba(245,177,76,0.1); color: #F5B14C; border-color: rgba(245,177,76,0.2); }

components.name: Glass Panel Card
components.description: Standard elevated surface for content sections inside the app shell.
components.html:
My Recent Tickets

Ticket queue content lives here.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: rgba(15,20,29,0.62); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(56,232,176,0.08); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); padding: 24px 32px; } .ds-glass-card-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #cbd5e1; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-glass-card-body { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #8D98AC; margin: 0; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Incident/ticket status pill used in tables and lists.
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-status-badge--new { background: rgba(56,189,248,0.1); color: #38bdf8; border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.2); } .ds-status-badge--progress { background: rgba(245,177,76,0.1); color: #F5B14C; border-color: rgba(245,177,76,0.2); } .ds-status-badge--resolved { background: rgba(100,116,139,0.1); color: #94a3b8; border-color: rgba(100,116,139,0.2); }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Zero-data state with icon, message, and optional CTA.
components.html:
No tickets yet

When you report an issue, it will appear here.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 64px 24px; } .ds-empty-icon { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 20px; } .ds-empty-title { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #EAEEF5; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-empty-desc { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #8D98AC; max-width: 384px; margin: 0 0 24px; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-empty-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #12B489; color: #03130d; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-empty-cta:hover { background: #38E8B0; }

narrative.overview: LeadAIStudio is a DEX-first IT operations platform where design serves the task, not the spectacle. The visual system reads as a capable enterprise tool: dark ink surfaces, restrained signal-mint accents, and information hierarchy that helps IT staff scan queues under pressure while keeping employee self-service approachable. The codebase carries a Mission Control heritage, but the strategic direction is enterprise calm: trustworthy, restrained, modern.
keyCharacteristics: Dark ink ground (#080B11) with cool violet ambient depth
Signal-mint (#38E8B0) as primary accent — remapped from indigo in dark app mode
Bricolage Grotesque for display headings; Plus Jakarta Sans for UI
Semantic color vocabulary for SLA and status
Dual theme system with light overrides

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Signal-mint appears on primary actions, active navigation, and state indicators only. It does not decorate cards, section backgrounds, or idle surfaces.

rules.name: The Semantic Integrity Rule
rules.body: Rose, amber, and emerald carry SLA and status meaning. Never remap them to signal-mint.

rules.name: The UI Sans Rule
rules.body: Buttons, inputs, data tables, and navigation labels use Plus Jakarta Sans only. Bricolage is for page-level headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards and list rows are flat at rest. Elevation appears on the app shell container and floating overlays only.

rules.name: The No-Glow-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Do not pair border with wide soft glow shadows on the same element.

dos: Do use signal-mint for primary actions, active nav, and operational highlights only.
Do keep semantic colors (rose/amber/emerald) for SLA and status.
Do use Plus Jakarta Sans for all UI chrome; reserve Bricolage for h1–h3 page titles.
Do maintain WCAG 2.1 AA contrast on dark surfaces.
Do use skeleton states for loading and EmptyState for zero-data.
donts: Don't use over-the-top sci-fi aesthetics — neon overload, glassmorphism as decoration, pulse-glow effects, hacker movie telemetry theatrics, or visual language that reads as gaming/cyberpunk rather than enterprise operations software.
Don't pair border: 1px solid with wide soft glow shadows on the same element.
Don't use rounded-3xl (24px+) on new cards or sections.
Don't use gradient text for metrics or headings.
Don't put Bricolage on buttons, form labels, table cells, or nav items.
Don't animate layout properties or gate content visibility on entrance animations.
Don't use decorative motion that doesn't convey state.
